query:
SELECT m.source_agent_id,
                  m.destination_ip,
                  m.latency_avg_ms,
                  m.latency_stddev_ms,
                  m.loss_pct,
                  m.mtr_id
             FROM measurements m
             JOIN campaign_pairs cp ON cp.measurement_id = m.id
            WHERE cp.campaign_id = $1
              AND cp.kind = 'campaign'
              AND m.kind IN ('campaign', 'detail_ping')
